instruction: Clean the stray marker out of the rainy alley. A small window on the far-left building should glow cyan, the broad haze should be centered over the street, and the tall pink sign should have its normal bold outline. Restore the warm reflection near the middle of the wet road as well.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky03" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#160a2e" />
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#2a1147" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#5a1a5e" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="ground03" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#3a1a4a" />
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#1a0c28" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#0c0618" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="haze03" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ff2d95" stop-opacity="0.35" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ff2d95" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <filter id="neon03" x="-60%" y="-60%" width="220%" height="220%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="5" /></filter>
    <filter id="neonbig03" x="-100%" y="-100%" width="300%" height="300%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="14" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky03)" id="download-sv_023-rect-001" />
  <ellipse cx="851" cy="560" rx="700" ry="300" fill="url(#haze03)" id="download-sv_023-ellipse-001" />

  
  <g fill="#1c0f33" opacity="0.8">
    <rect x="640" y="180" width="60" height="430" id="download-sv_023-rect-002" /><rect x="710" y="120" width="80" height="490" id="download-sv_023-rect-003" />
    <rect x="800" y="220" width="50" height="390" id="download-sv_023-rect-004" /><rect x="860" y="90" width="70" height="520" id="download-sv_023-rect-005" />
    <rect x="940" y="200" width="60" height="410" id="download-sv_023-rect-006" />
  </g>
  <g fill="#3a2050" opacity="0.5">
    <rect x="700" y="140" width="6" height="14" id="download-sv_023-rect-007" /><rect x="720" y="170" width="6" height="14" id="download-sv_023-rect-008" />
    <rect x="880" y="120" width="6" height="14" id="download-sv_023-rect-009" /><rect x="900" y="160" width="6" height="14" id="download-sv_023-rect-010" />
  </g>

  <polygon points="0,80 520,200 520,260 0,150" fill="#180a28" id="download-sv_023-polygon-002" />
  <g fill="#0c0618">
    <rect x="40" y="240" width="420" height="760" id="download-sv_023-rect-011" />
  </g>
  
  <g fill="#ffd27a" opacity="0.85">

  </g>

  
  <polygon points="1600,60 1080,200 1080,1000 1600,1000" fill="#2a1240" id="download-sv_023-polygon-003" />
